title: AgentOps Outcome Rubric
description: Rubric consumed by `ao outcomes run --rubric=<path>`. Defines pass criteria, weights, and retry budget for a separate-context grader loop. See .agents/specs/ao-outcomes.md.

version.description: Schema version. Always 1 for this file.

name.description: Human-readable rubric name (for logs and result JSON).

description.description: What this rubric grades. Optional but recommended.

criteria.description: List of grading criteria. Grader scores each independently; the weighted sum determines pass/fail.

id.description: Stable identifier for this criterion (lowercase, snake-or-kebab).

description.description: What this criterion measures, in plain English. The grader sees this verbatim.

weight.description: Weight in the [0,1] range. Sum of all weights should be 1.0 (validated).

kind.description: objective = mechanically verifiable (test passes, file exists); subjective = grader judgment (copy quality, brand voice).

pass_threshold.description: Minimum weighted score (0.0-1.0) required to pass. Default 0.8.

retry_budget.description: Maximum number of target re-runs before giving up. Default 3, hard cap 10.

grader_timeout_seconds.description: Per-grader-invocation timeout in seconds. Default 300 (5 min).
